\"Long after the war between the 7 natio: "Long after the war between the 7 nations, practice of ancient rituals has continued in secrecy.
The home of Cyrela was located deep with: The home of Cyrela was located deep within the woods of Aevium.
Once Cyrela died, her subordinates took: Once Cyrela died, her subordinates took her estate and turned it into a place of worship for their goddess, Meloetta.
Cyrela's subordinates were known to be r: Cyrela's subordinates were known to be radical cultists that participated in mass sacrificial rituals.

Estranged family of Cyrela then took her: Estranged family of Cyrela then took her mansion and protected it from being used in harmful ways ever again.
\"Long ago there existed the Queen of Ae: "Long ago there existed the Queen of Aevium.
She was revered by her people and respec: She was revered by her people and respected by the smaller kingdoms that existed under her wing.
On the battlefield, she fought with her: On the battlefield, she fought with her army as she thought if her people's life were on the line, then hers should be as well.
By the Gods, she was blessed with dual c: By the Gods, she was blessed with dual crystal swords she dubbed as Benevolence and Malevolence.
Two halves of the same coin that struck: Two halves of the same coin that struck together in unison.
One never overpowering the other, and ne: One never overpowering the other, and never faltering.
It was with these very swords that the Q: It was with these very swords that the Queen ended the war.
